{{CargoRelic
|name=Miracle Conch
|class_id=20232
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This strange conch went through a simple Turing test, and the testers decided that the intelligence level of this conch was lower than a starfish.
|fame=20
|art=12
|fth=30
|civ=17
|tech=11
|ss1=Sailors lost entering the next stage -4%
|ss2=Sailors lost entering the next stage -7%
|ss3=Sailors lost entering the next stage -10%
|ss4=Sailors lost entering the next stage -10%
|ss7=Sailors lost entering the next stage -10%<br> (Awakened)
}}
